scholarships.title: CCCD Senior Scholarship
scholarships.desc: Scholarship for Chester County Community College district high school seniors
scholarships.eligibility: High school seniors in CCCD district

scholarships.title: West Chester University PASSHE Foundation Scholarship
scholarships.desc: Foundation scholarship for West Chester University students
scholarships.eligibility: Admitted or current West Chester University students

scholarships.title: Pennsylvania Food Merchants Association Thomas R. and Laura Ridge Scholarship
scholarships.desc: Scholarship for students pursuing food retail and grocery industry careers
scholarships.eligibility: Pennsylvania residents pursuing food retail careers

scholarships.title: Bryson Funk Memorial Award
scholarships.desc: Three awards of $324 each for local students

scholarships.title: Western Chester County Chamber Academic and Trades Scholarships
scholarships.desc: Scholarships for academic and trades career paths
scholarships.eligibility: Western Chester County residents pursuing academic or trades education
scholarships.source: Western Chester County Chamber of Commerce

internships.title: Tague Lumber Door Shop Internship
internships.desc: Part-time and full-time internship opportunities in Phoenixville, PA
internships.eligibility: High school or college students interested in retail/construction
internships.how: Contact Tague Lumber directly or submit resume

internships.title: Chester County History Center IDEAL Summer Internship
internships.desc: 9-week paid summer internship at Chester County History Center
internships.eligibility: College students interested in history and heritage
internships.how: Online application through History Center website

internships.title: Wayne Art Center Summer Camp Internship
internships.desc: Summer internship positions for 2026 Summer Art Camp
internships.eligibility: High school or college students with art background

internships.title: Chester County Library Internship
internships.desc: Internship positions at Chester County Library main location or Henrietta Hankin Branch
internships.eligibility: High school or college students interested in library services
internships.how: Submit application and resume to library HR

internships.title: Chester County Adult Probation Internship
internships.desc: Summer internship for human service students in adult probation department
internships.eligibility: Human service students with good academic standing

universityPrograms.title: West Chester University Scholarship Programs
universityPrograms.desc: Comprehensive scholarship offerings for admitted students
universityPrograms.how: FAFSA and WCU scholarship portal application

universityPrograms.title: CCCD to Four-Year University Transfer Scholarships
universityPrograms.desc: Articulation and transfer scholarships for CCCD students
universityPrograms.eligibility: CCCD students transferring to four-year institutions
